caption: The video captures a formal discussion or panel event organized by The Institute of International and European Affairs (IIEA), as indicated by the banners in the background. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated at a table with microphones, nameplates, and glasses of water, suggesting they are speakers or panelists. The man on the left, wearing a red tie, appears to be actively engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hands while speaking. The man on the right, wearing a blue tie, listens attentively, occasionally nodding and responding. The setting is professional, with a focus on intellectual discourse, likely addressing topics related to international or European affairs. The presence of an audience member in the foreground adds to the sense of a live, interactive event.
